title_ja: 寝室・立ち・ダイレクトフラッシュ・ミラーセルフィー
title_en: Bedroom mirror selfie, on-camera flash, standing

subject.description: Young woman takes a direct-flash smartphone mirror selfie in a bedroom at night.
mirror_rules: Subject visible in mirror; phone visible in hand in reflection
Single smartphone, five fingers per hand, no duplicated phone edges
Any visible text readable and not mirrored incorrectly

pose.overall: One hand holds phone near face; other hand across opposite shoulder and upper chest; slight torso twist

layered_from_skin_outward: Strapless white cotton bandeau tube top, fitted plain
Loose plaid pajama pants, dark gray and muted off-white check, relaxed fit, low-rise in frame

photography.camera_style: Smartphone mirror selfie, strong on-camera flash over dim room
photography.texture: Sharp flash, faint grain, mirror dust, subtle glare, social-media realism
